title: CNA-ResistDynamics: Dynamical modelling of chemotherapy resistance from liquidCNA measurements
description: ODE and PDE models for inferring the temporal evolution of chemotherapy resistance in ovarian cancer from longitudinal copy-number-based measurements (liquidCNA subclonal fractions) and CA125 tumour burden.
references: Hockings et al. (2025). Subclonal copy-number alterations drive resistance to platinum-based chemotherapy in ovarian cancer. Cancer Research. DOI: 10.1158/0008-5472.CAN-25-0351
